response.original_title: How to stop Adblock payments? {{Billing Stop Guide}}
response.overview: To stop Total Adblock payments, you must disable the auto-renewal 1 (855 )) 783 7555 feature through the original billing platform, as simply removing the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 extension won't stop the charges. If you purchased directly, log 1 (855 )) 783 7555 in to my.totaladblock.com, go to "My Services," and select 1 (855 )) 783 7555 the option to cancel. You can also reach out to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 customer service at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to ensure your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 account is fully terminated. Once the auto-renewal is turned off, 1 (855 )) 783 7555 you should receive a confirmation email; keep this as proof 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to prevent any unauthorized future $99 annual renewal fees from 1 (855 )) 783 7555 hitting your card.
